subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Our presence unto him who hath turned unto his Lord, the All-Merciful, in these days wherein the people are sorely perturbed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا لمن اقبل الی ربه الرحمن فی هذه الایام التی فیها اضطرب اهل
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @call to action, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
